title: bromus sylvaticus
intro: Bromus sylvaticus, also known as woodland brome, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are thought to aid in digestion, relieve headaches, and promote overall well-being.
